links.label:
Board of Directors Founder & Voting Board Member

Menbere Teklu Abere is the visionary behind MERKUZ, merging an MBA in Organizational Development with a clinical career at El Camino Health. Her leadership is defined by a unique ability to bridge strategic goals with compassionate, human-centered service.

Rooted in over a decade of experience as a mental health advocate, Menbere founded MERKUZ to create the community-led support systems she realized were missing during her own journey. Today, she champions mental wellness and cultural preservation, ensuring families feel seen, supported, and empowered.

hero.label: Whole-Person Healing
hero.heading:
Holistic Mental Health
and Wellness Center
hero.subtitle: Culturally oriented, language-specific access to care where family is the main source of support for individuals with mental illness.
hero.amharic: ምርኩዝ ሁለንተናዊ የአእምሮ ጤና እና ደህንነት ማእከል — በባህል ላይ ያተኮረ፣ የአዕምሮ ህመም ላለባቸው ግለሰቦች ዋናው የድጋፍ ምንጭ ቤተሰብ የሆነበት ቋንቋ-ተኮር እንክብካቤ

story.label: Our Story
story.title:
Built from lived
experience, shaped
by compassion.
story.desc:
About MERKUZ
At MERKUZ, we believe that true healing begins when you finally feel at home. For many in our community, the path to wellness is often obstructed by a "Period of Rejection"—a time when clinical care feels disconnected from cultural reality. We are here to change that.
By seamlessly blending clinical expertise with the profound richness of African cultural heritage, we transform isolation into a powerful sense of connection. Our approach ensures that no one has to leave their identity at the door to receive world-class care. We aren't just treating symptoms; we are fostering a homecoming where your heritage is the heartbeat of your healing. At MERKUZ, you are never an outsider in your own recovery—you are exactly where you belong.
paragraphs: Merkuz Holistic Mental Health and Wellness Center was founded through the lived experience of our founder, Menbere Abere, who spent over a decade as a caregiver for loved ones living with mental health conditions. Her personal journey ignited a deep commitment to support others — especially those from underrepresented communities — who are navigating similar challenges. MERKUZ is an Amharic word which means a walking stick. From many years of experience supporting family members who were struggling with mental illness , she wittnesed that being a support like MERKUZ in their journey from acceptance to recoery was the main component.

A 2022 study by the American Psychological Association highlighted that children and families who have experienced migration-related trauma often encounter significant obstacles in accessing mental health support. Merkuz was founded to help bridge that gap.

Located in the Greater Bay Area, Merkuz was created to serve individuals and families of the African Diaspora communities. Many of these families face unique barriers to mental health care due to cultural stigma, language differences, and a general distrust of health systems.

We offer culturally sensitive, language-specific services that recognize the central role of family and community in healing. Our work addresses issues related to mental health, substance use, and emotional well-being — with a particular focus on helping immigrant communities adjust to life in the U.S. We understand the emotional and psychological challenges that come with resettlement and aim to provide the support and tools needed not just to survive, but to thrive.

Menbere Teklu Abere
Founder & Board Member
A dedicated advocate with over a decade of experience as a caregiver, Menbere founded MERKUZ to bridge the gap in culturally sensitive mental health support for the African Diaspora.

Desta Gebre-Medhin-Huff
Chief Financial Officer & Founding Board Member
Desta provides strategic financial oversight and governance, ensuring the organization’s resources are effectively managed to support community wellness and sustainability.

Dr. Sara Maklad
Clinical Director & Founding Board Member
Dr. Maklad leads the clinical vision of MERKUZ, integrating professional mental health expertise with culturally resonant care models to foster deep healing.

Sharon Wossen
Foundidng Board Member & Secretary
Sharon is a business-minded professional with a strong foundation in business principles and a passion for growth and development. With a solutions-oriented approach, she is dedicated to building opportunities that create long-term value and meaningful community impact.

Saron Ephraim Williams
Founding Board Member
The strategic architect of MERKUZ, Saron brings 12 years of public health expertise across state and federal sectors. As a strategy expert and entrepreneur, she oversees our large-scale initiatives, ensuring they are professionally executed and strategically messaged for maximum community impact.

Dr. Yesalemush Sendeku
Board Member
A distinguished educator and advocate, Dr. Yesalemush brings decades of institutional knowledge to MERKUZ. She focuses on cultural preservation and community building, ensuring our programs offer meaningful opportunities for growth.
story.quote: At Merkuz, we walk alongside our clients as they begin a new chapter — grounded in culture, supported by family, and empowered to heal.
amharicParagraphs: የምርኩዝ ሁለንተናዊ የአእምሮ ጤና እና ደህንነት ማእከል የተመሰረተው የመስራቻችንን ከ10 አመት በላይ የአዕምሮ ጤና ችግር ላለባቸው የቅርብ ቤተሰቦች አስታማሚ እና ረዳት በመሆን ባሳለፉት በግል ጉዞ ምክንያት ያገኙትን ልምድ መሰረት በማድረግ ያገኙትን ልምድ ለሌሎች ለማካፈል ነው።
ማእከሉ የተወለደው በካሊፎረኒያ ግዛት በሳንታ ክላራ ካውንቲ ውስጥ ከአእምሮ ህመም ሁኔታዎች ጋር ለሚታገሉ በተለይም ከአፍሪካ በተለያዩ ምክንያቶች ወደ አሜሪካ ለመኖር የመጡ  ብዙ ግለሰቦች ለመርዳት ካለው ራዕይ ነው።

በ2022 የአሜሪካ የሥነ ልቦና ማኅበር ባደረገው ጥናት፣ በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ የሚኖሩ ሕፃናትና ቤተሰቦች ከስደት ጋር ተያይዞ ጉዳት የደረሰባቸው ሕፃናትና ቤተሰቦች ለጉዳት የሚያጋልጡ እንቅፋቶችን አግኝተዋል። ምርኩዝ ይህንን ክፍተት ለማስተካከል እና የማህበረሰቡ አባላት የአእምሮ ጤናን፣ የአደንዛዥ እፅን አላግባብ መጠቀምን እና ስሜታዊ ደህንነትን ለመፍታት እንሰራለን።
ተልእኳችን ወገኖቻችን አዲስ ጉዞ ሲጀምሩ ከአዲሱ ሃገራቸው እንዲሁም ከአካባቢያቸው ጋር በተሻለ ሁኔታ እንዲግባቡና እና እንዲያድጉ ነው።

የመሪዎች እና የአመራር ቦርድ

መንበረ ተክሉ አበራ
መስራች እና የቦርድ አባል
ከአስር አመታት በላይ የአእምሮ ጤና አስታማሚ በመሆን ባገኙት ልምድ፣ መንበረ ለአፍሪካ ዲያስፖራ ማህበረሰብ ባህላዊ ይዘቱን የጠበቀ የአእምሮ ጤና ድጋፍ ለመስጠት ምርኩዝን መስርተዋል።

ደስታ ገብረመድህን-ሀፍ
ዋና የፋይናንስ ኦፊሰር እና መስራች የቦርድ አባል
ደስታ የማህበረሰቡን ደህንነት ለማረጋገጥ እንዲቻል ድርጅቱ ውጤታማ የፋይናንስ አስተዳደር እና ስልታዊ አመራር እንዲኖረው ያደርጋሉ።

ዶ/ር ሳራ መክላድ
የክሊኒካል ዳይሬክተር እና መስራች የቦርድ አባል
ዶ/ር ሳራ ሙያዊ የአእምሮ ጤና እውቀትን ከባህላዊ የሕክምና ሞዴሎች ጋር በማዋሃድ የምርኩዝን ክሊኒካዊ ራዕይ ይመራሉ ።

ሳሮን ኤፍሬም ዊሊያምስ
መስራች የቦርድ አባል
የምርኩዝ የስትራቴጂ አርክቴክት የሆኑት ሳሮን በክልል እና በፌዴራል የህዝብ ጤና ዘርፎች የ12 ዓመታት ልምድ አላቸው። ትልልቅ ፕሮጀክቶቻችን በማህበረሰቡ ላይ ከፍተኛ ተፅእኖ እንዲፈጥሩ በስልታዊ መልኩ የተመሩ መሆናቸውን ያረጋግጣሉ።

ሻሮን ወሰን
መስራች የቦርድ አባል እና ፀሐፊ
ሻሮን በንግድ ስራ መርሆች ላይ ጠንካራ መሰረት ያላት እና ለዕድገትና ለልማት ከፍተኛ ፍላጎት ያላት ባለሙያ ነች። የረጅም ጊዜ ጠቀሜታ እና የማህበረሰብ ተፅእኖ የሚፈጥሩ እድሎችን ለመገንባት ትተጋለች።

ዶ/ር የሰላሙሽ ሰንደቁ
የቦርድ አባል
ታዋቂ አስተማሪ እና የማህበረሰብ ተሟጋች የሆኑት ዶ/ር የሰላሙሽ፣ ለብዙ አስርተ አመታት ያካበቱትን የእውቀት ልምድ ወደ ምርኩዝ ይዘው መጥተዋል። ትኩረታቸውም ባህልን ጠብቆ ማቆየት እና ማህበረሰብን መገንባት ላይ ነው።

banner.heading:
Merkuz Is Your Partner in
Mental Health and Wellness
banner.amharic: ምርኩዝ በአእምሮ ጤና እና ደህንነት ላይ የእርስዎ አጋር ነው።

services.label: Our Services
services.title:
Simple ways to begin,
connect, and heal.
services.desc: Whether you need guidance, community, or shared support, Merkuz offers welcoming entry points into care.

cards.title: Counselling Sessions
cards.en: If you're not sure which program fits you, joining one of our Counseling Sessions is a great place to start. Whatever you decide, keep in mind that you can always try other options until you find the right fit for you.
cards.am: የትኛው ፕሮግራም ለእርስዎ እንደሚስማማ እርግጠኛ ካልሆኑ፣ የእኛን የምክር ክፍለ ጊዜ መቀላቀል ለመጀመር ጥሩ ቦታ ነው። ለእርስዎ የሚስማማዎትን እስኪያገኙ ድረስ ሁልጊዜ ሌሎች አማራጮችን መሞከር እንደሚችሉ ያስታውሱ.

cards.title: Community Forums
cards.en: Community Forums are a great option for all kinds of individuals, but it all depends on what you're comfortable with. Our only goal is to make you feel safe and supported, so don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.
cards.am: የማህበረሰብ መድረኮች ለሁሉም አይነት ግለሰቦች ምርጥ አማራጭ ናቸው፣ ነገር ግን ሁሉም እርስዎ በሚመቹዎት ላይ የተመሰረተ ነው። ደህንነት እንዲሰማዎት እና እንዲደገፉ ማድረግ ነው ብቸኛ አላማችን።

cards.title: Peer-to-Peer Groups
cards.en: Our Peer-to-Peer Groups provide the kind of comprehensive support you seek as you navigate your challenges. We want you to feel comfortable and at ease, so let us know what's on your mind.
cards.am: የምርኩዝ ድጋፍ ቡድን የጀመረው እያንዳንዳችን ራሳችንን ቻይ መሆናችንን እና የችግራችን መቋቋም አቅምን ማዳበር የምንችለው በማህበረሰቡ እርዳታ እና ድጋፍ ነው በሚል እምነት ነው።

cards.title: New Service
cards.en:
Board of Directors Founder & Voting Board Member

Menbere Teklu Abere is the visionary behind MERKUZ, merging an MBA in Organizational Development with a clinical career at El Camino Health. Her leadership is defined by a unique ability to bridge strategic goals with compassionate, human-centered service.

Rooted in over a decade of experience as a mental health advocate, Menbere founded MERKUZ to create the community-led support systems she realized were missing during her own journey. Today, she champions mental wellness and cultural preservation, ensuring families feel seen, supported, and empowered.

cards.title: New Service
cards.en:
Dr. Sara Maklad
Founder & Voting Board Member & Clinical Director

Dr. Sara Maklad is an esteemed researcher and academic who brings a rigorous, evidence-based approach to the MERKUZ board. Formerly a Research Fellow at Stanford University, Dr. Maklad has dedicated her career to exploring complex systems and finding innovative solutions to societal challenges.

At MERKUZ, Dr. Maklad leverages data and research to amplify the organization's mission, ensuring that all initiatives—from cultural events to mental health advocacy—are built on a foundation of excellence and measurable impact. Driven by a desire to bridge the gap between research and real-world application, she ensures MERKUZ remains a leader in evidence-based community empowerment.

cards.title: New Service
cards.en:
Desta Gebre-Medhin-Huff
Founder & Voting  Board Member & Chief Financial Officer

Desta Gebre-Medhin-Huff is a distinguished financial executive with over 25 years of experience in risk management and strategic oversight. Most recently serving as the Managing Director and Chief Risk Officer at Lendistry, and formerly Vice President at Union Bank of California, Desta is a recognized leader in building robust financial frameworks for mission-driven institutions.

At MERKUZ, Desta serves as a vital financial anchor. She leverages her deep expertise in governance and operational risk to ensure the organization’s long-term sustainability and transparency. By applying corporate-level financial rigor to the MERKUZ mission, she ensures the organization remains a trusted, resilient foundation for cultural and wellness initiatives.

programs.label: Programs
programs.title:
Holistic support,
delivered with care.
programs.desc: Programs designed to support emotional well-being, learning, community connection, and advocacy.
items: Secular and Religious Counseling and Therapy
Adults , Family and Children Behavioural Health Services
programs.amharicTitle: የምርኩዝ የአእምሮ ጤና እና ደህንነት ማእከል
amharicParagraphs: ይህ የአእምሮ ጤና ድጋፍ ቡድን የጀመረው እያንዳንዳችን ራሳችንን ቻይ መሆናችንን እና የችግራችን መቋቋም አቅምን ማዳበር የምንችለው በማህበረሰቡ እርዳታ እና ድጋፍ ነው በሚል እምነት ነው።
የእኛ አባላት ለግል እድገት፣ ራስን ለማንፀባረቅ፣ ለመማር እና ለመተሳሰር እና ቦታ ይሰጣሉ። ለበለጠ መረጃ ጋብዘናቹህ እንደምትቀላቀሉን ተስፋ እናደርጋለን!

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title:
Whole-Person Healing
Starts Here
contact.desc: We're here to support you and your family. Reach out to learn more about our services or to begin your healing journey.
